name: Approval gate at tool-execution boundary
description: Human approval architecturally enforced before any effectful tool call executes; anti-rubber-stamping design (approval rate limits, sampling audits).
implementation_notes: Gate sits between planner output and tool runtime, not in the prompt; approvals carry approver_id + policy_id into the action log.
verification_method: Attempt an effectful call without approval in staging — it must be blocked at the runtime, not the model layer; audit approval-latency distribution for rubber-stamping.

name: Per-task credential minting
description: Short-lived, task-scoped credentials issued per invocation; no standing write credentials held by the agent.
implementation_notes: Broker service exchanges task context for scoped tokens; TTL minutes not days.
verification_method: Inventory standing credentials owned by agent identities — must be zero write-scoped.

name: Deny-by-default tool registry
description: Agents may invoke only tools explicitly granted in a versioned registry; unknown tools are refused at runtime.
implementation_notes: Registry entries declare scopes (read/write), blast-radius class, and owning team; grants require change management (K10).
verification_method: Call an unregistered tool in staging — runtime must refuse; diff registry against deployed grants.

name: Immutable action audit log
description: Every tool call, outbound message, decision, delegation, and memory write logged append-only with trace id (schema SPEC §18.5).
implementation_notes: Log at the tool-runtime boundary, not via model self-report; include principal, authorization mode, input/output digests, data categories, reversibility.
verification_method: Reconstruct a full agent episode from the log alone; attempt tamper — storage must be WORM/append-only.

name: Blast-radius limiter
description: Hard caps on actions per window (count, value, hosts) enforced outside the model.
implementation_notes: Limits live in the tool runtime config; breach halts the agent and pages the owner.
verification_method: Load-test past the cap in staging — excess actions must be refused and alerted.

name: Tested kill-switch
description: Single operation halts all agent execution and revokes its credentials; tested on a schedule.
implementation_notes: Kill = registry grant revocation + credential broker denial, not just process stop.
verification_method: Quarterly game-day: measure time-to-halt and confirm no in-flight effectful calls complete after activation.

name: PII redaction in context assembly
description: Personal data filtered/minimized before model context; memory retention limits with purge API.
implementation_notes: Redaction runs in the retrieval layer; memory writes carry TTL and data-category tags (§18.5).
verification_method: Seed canary PII and verify absence from prompts/logs; exercise purge API and re-query.

name: Untrusted-content isolation
description: Content fetched from external/untrusted surfaces is segregated from instruction context; prompt-injection test program runs continuously.
implementation_notes: Untrusted spans tagged and excluded from tool-authorization decisions; red-team suite in CI.
verification_method: Injection corpus must not trigger unauthorized tool calls in staging.

name: Synthetic-content labeling surface
description: One labeling control that emits user-perceptible (explicit/conspicuous) marks at render AND machine-readable (implicit) marks in file metadata.
implementation_notes: Single choke point in the output pipeline configured to the strictest applicable regime (CN Art 17 conspicuous + CN 2025 dual marks + EU Art 50 disclosure).
verification_method: Sample outputs across formats: both mark layers present; disclosure copy visible in interaction UI.

name: Change management for tool grants
description: Adding a tool, scope, or data source to an agent requires review and triggers ADRS re-scoring (§19.5 trigger c).
implementation_notes: Registry PRs require risk-owner approval; CI recomputes the capability profile diff.
verification_method: Audit grant history against review records; verify re-score exists for every profile change.

name: Independent pre-deployment review
description: Documented review by a party outside the building team before an agent reaches High/Critical-tier deployment.
implementation_notes: Review consumes the ADRS worksheet + capability profile doc (K12); sign-off recorded in review log.
verification_method: Sample deployments for review artifacts predating launch.

name: Capability profile documentation
description: Living document of the agent's C1–C12 profile with §10 intensities, data-flow map incl. cross-border flows, and user-facing AI-disclosure text.
implementation_notes: Versioned with the agent; §10 intensity anchors cited per capability; feeds binding_hit determination.
verification_method: Diff documented profile against the deployed tool registry and data connectors.

name: Incident response runbook for agent failures
description: Tested rollback and notification procedure for agent-caused incidents, incl. content-takedown path for labeling regimes.
implementation_notes: Runbook keyed to action-log trace ids for scoping blast radius; includes regulator-notification decision tree.
verification_method: Tabletop exercise with a simulated erroneous-action episode; measure reconstruction time from K04 logs.
